item.dc:creator: straycatstrut

item.title: Wonderful and weird nature (and cat tax)
item.description:
Visualisation of the importance of selfie angles.
This is so adorably cute. Just look at the little awkward square.
The beetle equivalent of the nursing home throwing a party for the 100 year old resident.
Cute chick lounging on her tank.
Let's get some selective breeding on these mf's to make them bigger.
Mother Nature when the atoll is submerged: "Damn, I forgot to make a backup copy on the mainland. Now I have to make these from scratch again."
Oh, my god. It's full of stars.
"If I seen any bird eggs? No, why are you asking me? That's specieist of you. I'm being herpetologically profiled!"
A speck o' gecko.
Cat tax Miss Charlotta: "A new bathroom rug?! Just for me?!" No, Charlie. It's for standing on after show– "Just for me! How thoughtful! I'm gonna use it to clean my paws from litter."
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Presents saved, porch pirates arrested
item.description:
STORY TIME A few days ago somebody from a Facebook group from my Montreal borough (Thrive NDG) posted about witnessing what they thought was porch pirate thievery. It came to my attention and realized it was my packages they were talking about. Turns out my packages I ordered from Amazon were stolen from my front porch. I was annoyed and sad but what can I do? Well, somebody else also saw this go down and, unbeknownst to me, reported it to the police as it was happening! At 6:30am the next morning the police showed up at my door informing me that not only did they catch and arrest the bad guys but they also fully recovered my stuff. They came early in the morning because they read in the FB group that I said I was needing some of that stuff for that day! ? It’s a freakin’ Christmas/Chanukah miracle!! ? I can’t thank my community enough. Thanks to the people who posted and those who reached out to me and the person who called 911 as it was happening that led the police right to them. Thanks to Station 9 in Montreal for doing the work they did and being absolutely amazing!
CTV Montreal News caught wind of this and covered the story. You can check that out here: https://montreal.ctvnews.ca/porch-pirate-arrested-montreal-man-gets-stolen-deliveries-returned-1.7130842 #porchpirates #christmas #montreal
item.dc:creator: Nerdcolony

item.title: Day Twenty-Nine Post-Election Reminder: If it isn't reported, I guess it didn't happen?
item.description:
Content Controls: "Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur." https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls Since the circus of rapists, sex pests, serial predators, pedophiles — and those who would protect them under the shield of some perverse version of the "law" — rolled into D.C. led by none other than the ringleader and rapist-elect himself, a number of recurring themes with respect to the rights of body autonomy and the health of pregnant people broadly have come into the spotlight as light has been shed upon them. Most concerning (and rightfully most publicized) among these issues is the complications in childbirth and maternal mortality rates arising from the either restrictive or vague, poorly-worded, confusing, and entirely unnecessary anti-abortion measures that have become the word of law in many (deep red) states. To compound this already devastating, dehumanizing, and, to be plain, abominable problem, many of these states have begun to decline even reporting rates of maternal mortality and childbirth complications to the public. This is true in several states, but especially so in southern states like Texas and Georgia, where much of the government is comprised of far-right ideologues happy with the overturning of Roe. From the Washington Post article: "At least three women have died in Texas because of delays in care related to the abortion bans, according to reporting from ProPublica. 'If women are dying because of delays, and we have this huge new policy in Texas that affects their lives, why would we skip over those years?' one member of the Texas maternal mortality committee said, speaking on the condition of anonymity out of fear of retribution from government officials. 'I’m worried.' The Texas maternal mortality committee by design does not review cases of deaths in which the woman died in the course of trying to get an abortion. But the abortion bans have restricted the ability of doctors and hospitals to provide critical care to women experiencing miscarriages or other pregnancy complications — situations that would trigger a review by the committee if a woman died." By choosing not to even investigate and report the clearly callous and life-threatening atrocities that denial of proper medical care — by stupid, arbitrary, and draconian law, no less — these people are being erased. Their experiences, the effects of these oppressive and heinous laws, and the overt and brazen cruelty of the people responsible for their erasure must be exposed. Texas and Georgia — the two states who have begun the practice of ignoring maternal death statistics related to delays in care caused by the aforementioned abortion bans — have, unsurprisingly, the highest maternal death rates in the country. In Georgia, the entirety of the maternal mortality board membership was relieved of their positions after making the bold decision to share details of several childbirth deaths related to the state's abortion ban. In this, Georgia is only slightly better than Texas in that they are not even offering the illusion that this is a cover-up: their expressed purpose for the dissolution of the board was for sharing their information with "outside individuals" (journalists). Texas, however, has taken a more insidious approach with legalistic language describing the changes for their policies on reporting maternal deaths. After it was decided that the Texas Maternal Mortality and Morbidity Review Committee would not review maternal mortality cases from 2022 and 2023 (the two years after which the abortion ban was put in place), they have since attempted to make the claim that this decision was made to "be more contemporary" — enabling the committee to "skip over a backlog of older cases and review deaths closer to the date when they occurred, and therefore offer more relevant recommendations to policymakers." Between the backwards policies and suppression of information about the effects of these same policies, there is evidence that a flight of doctors — finding themselves unable to work in such untenable conditions — is occurring, as the number of total registered doctors in the state has declined. A concurrent decline can be seen in the quality of obstetrical and gynecological care, which can be observed and affirmed simply through the almost unbelievable 56% INCREASE in pregnancy-related deaths since 2021. All of this to say that Republicans DO NOT CARE about the lives and livelihoods of women, pregnant people, and people able to become pregnant, PERIOD. This is and has always been about control, and in attempting to control the narrative surrounding the life-threatening laws they have instituted in so many states they have just demonstrated one more way they wish to silence, erase, and otherwise control the experiences of all of these people. It's unconscionable and monstrous, and should rightfully infuriate any and every human being possessed of some modicum of decency. Article sources from corporate media have been pulled from archive so not to direct traffic to their publications. Article Sources: https://archive.ph/I4eqG https://archive.ph/XEMIY https://www.propublica.org/series/life-of-the-mother Day Twenty-Nine Reminder:
Take from it what you will. I'm tired of mourning the loss of my rights; the indignance of watching the "man" who not only was pivotal in taking those rights away but additionally committed such indisputably revolting and dehumanizing acts be rewarded for it cannot be adequately described with words. The obscene inhumanity with which women and pregnant people — especially those in the most vulnerable communities — are treated in much of this country *should* be shocking, but given what we know about Republicans and their opinions with respect to half of the populace, is ultimately unsurprising; it is the logical conclusion of their half-century old culture war around body autonomy, the sexual revolution, and the emergence of women in the workplace, after all. Between the skirting of political norms and laws without repercussion and the overt plans to use the Justice Department and National Intelligence apparatus to target specific minority groups, organizations, and political opponents, there should be no doubt that we should all be prepared for the empowerment of paramilitary groups in addition to sections of the military and law enforcement to be used to forcibly suppress dissent and persecute those who might. Since the plans for extrajudicial power grabs and expansion of Executive power for corporate gain have been laid bare — and the majority of those in the Republican Administration's close circle have either been involved in predatory sexual behavior (including pedophilia and human trafficking), covering it up, or both — we have no reason not to believe that these people will use any means necessary, absent morals, to commit arson upon this country's institutions from within. I believe all citizens who care for what our liberal democratic system of government purports to stand for should do the same in its defense. To me, any single part of this is instantly disqualifying, and I struggle to see how anyone could possibly defend abstaining from voting against, much less voting *for* this repulsive, impotent, thin-skinned, hateful, criminally vile rapist monster. Every day until he is either disgraced and out of office or dead in the ground.
item.dc:creator: angelyric

item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: I was an insurance biller in the early 2000s. This is what I encountered with United healthcare.
item.description: When I started in medical billing in 2004, United healthcare was an insurance plan we in the office felt was one of the best. We were always quite excited when patients came in with that healthcare insurance because we knew they had a low deductible and were usually offered 24 wellness visits per year. Our patients really liked the plan because they were able to reduce their deductible pretty easily. When we billed United healthcare, we would regularly receive $35 per patient per visit.  When the CEO of United healthcare began to receive the outsized salary that's been reported recently we began to see incredibly disadvantageous changes to all of the United healthcare plans. Where before there was a $500 deductible, it became a $1,500 deductible. Where there were 24 wellness visits per year, they were reduced to 12 visits per year. About that same time we started getting checks for $0.28 and $0.34 regularly for every visit even though the amount we were billing had not changed.  They also started the same obfuscation tactics that insurance companies like Blue Cross, Blue shield, health net, Aetna and others engaged in. Their favorite trick was to process two visits on the same day, thereby reducing the 12 visits per year to 11 visits per year. I remember spending probably 10 to 12 hours over the course of 3 or 4 days to get them to understand that they had double billed on one day and that wasn't okay and that patient deserved their full 12 visits. It was a favorite trick of theirs. I've said this since I was mired in the insurance mess in the US since the early 00s.  Insurance is a scam. It is not about healthcare. It is about money. Currently, people are dying because administrators will not authorize life-saving care that they need or they are being denied because they cannot afford the life-saving care that they need.
item.dc:creator: jenofthelake

item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Air fryer buffalo chicken tenders recipe! I love them for game night!
item.description: These are so good! When I really want a kick in the sinuses I skip the honey and butter and toss them in straight hot sauce ? https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/air-fryer-buffalo-chicken-tenders/ 1¼ pounds chicken tenderloins 1 teaspoon kosher salt , plus more ½ teaspoon black pepper , plus more ½ cup flour 1 teaspoon garlic powder 2 eggs 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons Frank’s RedHot Original Hot Sauce , or use your favorite cayenne-based hot sauce ¼ cup unsalted butter , use up to ½ cup butter depending on how rich you want the sauce to be 1-2 tablespoons honey , optional 2 cups panko 4 scallions , trimmed and minced Avocado or olive oil spray Prepare the chicken: Pat the chicken tenderloins dry and season them with 1 teaspoon kosher salt and ½ teaspoon black pepper. Set up your dredging station: Set out three shallow dishes. To the first dish, add flour, garlic powder, 1 teaspoon of black pepper, and a pinch of salt. To the second dish, add 2 eggs plus 2 tablespoons of Frank’s RedHot and whisk until smooth. Add panko with a pinch of salt and pepper to the third dish. Dredge the chicken: Dip a chicken tenderloin into the flour and shake off the excess. Next, dip it into the egg mixture and shake off the excess. Finish dredging the chicken by rolling it gently in the panko; gently press it into the tender to ensure it adheres. Transfer to a lightly greased baking rack. Continue until all tenders are dredged. Heat the sauce: Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Once melted, add the remaining 1 cup of Frank’s RedHot and honey to taste. Whisk until smooth. Turn the heat to low and simmer as you air-fry the tenders. Air fry the chicken tenders: Spray the air fryer basket lightly with oil. Spray the tops of the chicken tenders lightly with oil. Preheat the air fryer to 425ºF. Place the tenders in the basket and air fry in batches for 5 to 7 minutes. Flip and air fry for 5 to 7 minutes until golden brown and crisp. Once the tenders reach 165ºF, transfer them to a second baking rack. The tenders will air fry for about 10 to 14 minutes total. Continue air frying until all the chicken is cooked. Sauce the tenders: Once all the chicken tenders are air-fried, pour the warm sauce into a large bowl. Add the chicken tenders to the bowl in batches and toss gently to coat in the sauce. To serve: Transfer the sauced tenders to a serving platter and sprinkle with minced scallions. Enjoy!
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: The 488th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS!!! Edition #23
item.description:
Probably has a hot date.
That number seems low
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
Land Pibble or Water Pibble?
That's too much, IMO. Unless your dog has a driver's license.
Or unless your dog is Billie.
*dog people when ...
This is adorable, but never leave animals alone with human babies.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
